trends.daily_trend_note: GSC API returns aggregated data for the date range. Daily breakdown requires separate per-day pulls (not performed in this deep analysis to stay within row limits).

analysis_1_snippet_leakage.description: Pages getting the most impressions but zero clicks — 'snippet leakage' where Google shows the page in results but users don't click through. These need title/meta-description optimization.

analysis_2_position_impression_ratio.description: Queries with the best position-to-impression ratio — high visibility efficiency. Also identifies undervalued queries (good position, low CTR) and top performers.
